case_title: DAVIS FAMILY TRUST et al vs. TOWNSEND, PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS FAMILY TRUST DAVIS, STANLEY-TRUSTEE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-14-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE PRO TEM MONICA S. BAUM; MNORMAN REPORTER; JPASTOR CLERK; C/C FOR S/C. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO FILE STIP AND JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOWNSEND, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2890 CALIFORNIA STREET #301, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,963.68 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,963.68, STAYED UNTIL AUG-28-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. DEFT WAIVES CLAIM FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF $986.73 SECURITY DEPOSIT OR ACCOUNTING; SEE JUDGMNT. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED. DEFT WAIVES RIGHT TO BRING WRONGFUL EVICTION SUIT AGAINST PLTFS ET AL. DEFT TO VACATE ON/BEFORE 8-27-96 AT 12 MIDNIGHT.
